posts.author: Shoaibali450 (Shoaib Ali)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Experts,
I want to integrate my google calendar with monday account. My google calendar contains resources e.g. meeting room, Projectors etc. Is there any native functionalities to fetch the data while booking the resource via google calendar? any advise on it? how we can do that?
looking forward to hear expert advise.

Regards,

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Shoaibali450 , Third party solution here, but it sounds like you need a 1-Way sync. You can use zzBots to both 1-Way or 2-Way Sync your data. With this sync any new or updated events in Google Calendar will automatically be synced to Monday.com.

Here is a link to get started: https://www.zzbots.com/store/google-calendar-mondaycom-1-way-sync

If your interested or need help setting up, just chat with us on our website.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Shoaibali450

Using the native monday Google Calendar integration is an effective way to synchronize your calendar, virtual meeting room, and other conferencing resources. The integration’s one-way sync allows you to display the dates from your Google Calendar directly on your monday board. Moreover, the integration helps in automatically fetching data from monday boards and adding it to the desired calendar.

Implementing Google Calendar integration is easier when you hire monday.com integration specialists from us. Our experts can easily personalize the intuitive integration API and implement it according to your business needs.
